title: JustEnoughGems
description: Huge 1.18 content mod with over 16 types of armor, tools, ingots and more!
body:
## JustEnoughGems

### About

This Fabric mod adds tons of content into the game, such as:

- Custom mining and ingots
- Weapons and tools with special effects
- Different orbs and amulets
- Armor and shields
- Daggers, double axes, double swords
- and much more!

### Guide

- The ores will spawn in the world, mine them multiple times until they disappear.
- Smelt the raw items collected from the ore in a furnace into fragments
- Join 9 fragments together in a crafting table to get an ingot
- Craft shields, tools, armor and weapons like in vanilla
- Right-click orbs to gain special effects. After 4 uses, the orb will disappear
- Place amulets in your inventory to gain infinite effects as long as the amulet is still in your inventory

### FAQ

- Will you port this to Forge? No, but feel free to make a fork and do it as long as you credit the original mod
- Where can I report a bug or suggest a feature? In the [issue tracker](https://github.com/RedGrapefruit09/JustEnoughGems/issues)
- Will you backport this to 1.17/1.16/1.15/1.14? No, I don't support legacy Minecraft versions, but you could make a fork for this too (with credit, of course)
- Can I put this in my modpack or YouTube video? Feel free to, but add a link to this page
- What license is this under? [MIT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/licenses/mit.txt)
